# Buzzter (formerly CastNow)

Buzzter (バズター) is an all-in-one video creation platform designed for YouTube, TikTok, and other SNS content creators to automate scriptwriting, narration, subtitles, and thumbnails.

## Core Slogan
"Not laziness. Just removing hassle." (手抜きじゃない。手間抜きだ。)

## Key Specifications
- **AI Scriptwriter**: Generates high-retention script templates based on viral structures.
- **Narrator**: Automatically generates voices via local VOICEVOX connection (requires Windows or Mac).
- **Subtitles**: Auto-burns karaoke-style subtitles synced with voice.
- **Thumbnails**: Generates thick impact-text thumbnails (9:16 or 16:9).
- **PDF to Video**: Automatically converts PDF slides to video with voiceover.
- **Video Merger**: Merges multiple video clips instantly in the browser.

## Characters & Supporters (Creator Support Units)
- **バズたか (Buzz-taka)**: Energetic and passionate boy robot who loves virality. Script specialist. Catchphrase: "Did it go viral?" (バズったか？)
- **バズ美 (Buzz-mi)**: Calm, silent, and numbers-driven girl robot who loves data. Thumbnail specialist. Communicates by showing tablet.

## Branding History
In June 2026, CastNow was renamed to Buzzter due to trademark issues. Features, pricing, and system operations remain identical.

## Developer Info
- **Organization**: Pon Smart (ぽんスマート)
- **Representative**: Hikaru Kanau (金雨輝龍)
- **Repository**: https://github.com/SasayanX/CastNouLP
